allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('dashboard/static/app.js', 'utf8'\); try { new Function\(src\); console.log\('syntax OK'\); } catch \(e\) { console.log\('SYNTAX ERROR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('dashboard/static/app.js', 'utf8'\); try { new Function\(src\); console.log\('syntax OK, length=' + src.length\); } catch \(e\) { console.log\('SYNTAX ERROR:', e.message\); }")
